nasb.text: How much more those who dwell in houses of clay, Whose foundation is in the dust, Who are crushed before the moth!

esv.text: how much more those who dwell in houses of clay, whose foundation is in the dust, who are crushed like  the moth.

cnv.text: 何況那些住在土屋裡， 根基在塵土中， 比蠹蟲還容易被壓碎的人呢？

ccb.text: 更何况源自尘土、 住在土造的躯壳里、 脆弱如蛾的世人呢？
